title: Ignore Rules, Attributes, Line Endings, and Repository Content · Graph Lens: Global Local Ignore
summary: Keep generated output, local configuration, binaries, and secrets out of history while preserving cross-platform text behavior. Planned artifact: Add and verify the git global local ignore increment in a content-boundary and normalization policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose repository ignore, info/exclude, and global excludes from whether a rule belongs to every collaborator or one environment.
Trace ignore sources, directory scope, pattern grammar, negation, tracked-state limits, and check-ignore evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# git-basics cumulative repository evidence notebook
